# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.artifact-name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set-artifact-name
        run: echo "artifact-name=build-artifacts" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "artifact content" > dist/app.txt

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-artifact-name.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/

  deploy:
    name: Deploy Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Execute deployment script
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
          ./scripts/deploy.sh dist/
